overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Fallout 4 showing a slow walk through a post-apocalyptic wasteland during a green radiation storm, approaching a makeshift wooden shack with string lights.

events.description: green lightning flash illuminates the sky behind the dead trees

agents.ego_description: slowly walking forward through the toxic wasteland toward the illuminated shack

entered.detail: wooden structure with corrugated metal roof and warm interior light
festive bulbs strung on poles leading to the shack entrance
tall dilapidated brick structure with broken windows
leafless bare trees silhouetted against the green sky
tilted wooden power line pole with crossbar
rusted drum container sitting near the shack

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly forward through a desolate post-apocalyptic wasteland under a toxic green storm sky. A makeshift wooden shack with a corrugated metal roof sits ahead, illuminated by warm string lights that contrast with the eerie green atmosphere. Around the 6-second mark, a flash of green lightning strikes behind the dead trees in the distance, briefly illuminating the hazy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, steady progression through a desolate wasteland under a toxic green storm that culminates in the approach to a warm, illuminated shelter. It begins with a forward movement through the irradiated landscape, where the eerie green glow of the sky dominates the hazy atmosphere. As the camera advances, a makeshift wooden shack with a corrugated metal roof emerges ahead, its warm string lights creating a sharp visual contrast against the sickly environment. The scene then intensifies as a flash of green lightning strikes behind distant dead trees, briefly brightening the horizon before the camera continues its approach toward the glowing sanctuary.
